tests/c_emit/bad/async_atomic_context.mc:4:1: error: E_ASYNC_FORBIDDEN_CONTEXT: `async fn` is forbidden in a #[atomic_context] context (it suspends and uses indirect dispatch)
tests/c_emit/bad/async_await_outside_async.mc:4:11: error: E_AWAIT_OUTSIDE_ASYNC: `await` is only valid inside an `async fn` (in 'bad')

tests/c_emit/bad/async_borrow_across_await.mc:13:10: error: E_ASYNC_BORROW_ACROSS_AWAIT: in async fn 'bad', a reference to a local or parameter (`&x`) is captured across an `await` — the future is returned by value, so an interior pointer dangles after the move (self-referential futures need pinning, unsupported in async v0). Restructure so no borrow of a captured value crosses the await.

tests/c_emit/bad/async_borrow_pinning.mc:23:10: error: E_ASYNC_BORROW_ACROSS_AWAIT: in async fn 'pinned', a reference to a local or parameter (`&x`) is captured across an `await` — the future is returned by value, so an interior pointer dangles after the move (self-referential futures need pinning, unsupported in async v0). Restructure so no borrow of a captured value crosses the await.
